Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Zenith Era]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 9''' — The Zenith Era was a period of high magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Zenith Era is a period or type of sample used for signal comparison.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 6''' — Mell uses Zenith-era schematics to make her Nova-Bots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — Many Zenith Era colonies used lighting that relies on the Aether only during manufacturing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Shadow Ark is a piece of Zenith Era miracle technology.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — No more than two Zenith Devices have been activated at any one time since the Zenith Era.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — The Zenith Cannon is described as the full armory of the Zenith Era.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — The Zenith Era produced the greatest magical wards.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 3''' — The Zenith Era was a time when all Zenith Devices were not awake.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — The Zenith Era was brought to an end by the might of the seven Zenith competitors.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
